name: Hao Wen Holdings Limited
summary: Hao Wen Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in money lending business in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, and internationally. The company also engages in the processing and trading of electronic parts; and manufacture and trading of biomass fuel products. It is also involved in the sale of burial plots and related services; and provision of cemetery maintenance services. Hao Wen Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong.
